failedAssertions.reason: Missing run-intent payload accepted with 202 and runId created (expected 400). Root cause: discovery worker server running outdated code - validation logic from commit 8c4186c (04:09:55) not loaded because server started at 01:48AM and hasn't been restarted.
Blank run-intent payload accepted with 202 and runId created (expected 400 with AI Suggester guidance). Root cause: same as VAL-API-006 - worker server needs restart to load commit 8c4186c.

notes: VAL-DATA-006 and VAL-DATA-007 (from grounded-html-quality-and-multisignal-dedupe) were not in the set of pending assertions per validation-state.json and were not tested in this round. VAL-UI-STATUS-008 passed - browser correctly blocks blank-intent Run and surfaces actionable AI Suggester guidance with no webhook emission. VAL-API-006 and VAL-API-008 failed because the running worker server has stale code. Fix: restart discovery_worker service then re-run these two API assertions.
